HEXAGHOST-JAR_OF_TOBSCO.title: Jar of Tobsco
HEXAGHOST-JAR_OF_TOBSCO.flavor: A little extra heat makes everything better.
HEXAGHOST-LIBRA.title: Libra
HEXAGHOST-LIBRA.description: Choose any number of your Strikes and Defends to Transform into their opposite type.
HEXAGHOST-MARK_OF_THE_ETHER.title: Mark of the Ether
HEXAGHOST-MARK_OF_THE_ETHER.flavor: Let's see if we can do... better.
HEXAGHOST-OLEXAS_SHIELD.title: Olexa's Shield
HEXAGHOST-OLEXAS_SHIELD.description: Powers are counted towards the progression of [gold]Searing[/gold] and [gold]Crushing Ghostflames[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-RECYCLER.title: Recycler
HEXAGHOST-RECYCLER.description: The first time a non-Status, non-Curse Ethereal card is Exhausted each combat, add a copy to your Hand.
HEXAGHOST-RECYCLER.flavor: One day, it shall be recycled too.
HEXAGHOST-RED_CANDLE.title: Red Candle
HEXAGHOST-RED_CANDLE.description: Whenever you apply Soulburn, apply 2 additional Soulburn.
HEXAGHOST-SNEAKY_TEAKWOOD_MATCH.title: Sneaky Teakwood Match
HEXAGHOST-SNEAKY_TEAKWOOD_MATCH.descript: The first time you [gold]Ignite[/gold] a Ghostflame each turn, you may choose to [gold]Advance[/gold] or [gold]Retract[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-SOUL_OF_CHAOS.title: Soul of Chaos
HEXAGHOST-SOUL_OF_CHAOS.description: At the start of your turn, move to a random Ghostflame and randomize it. At the end of your turn, play the top card of your draw pile.
HEXAGHOST-SOUL_STONE.title: Thermal Stone
HEXAGHOST-SOUL_STONE.description: Whenever you Exhaust 4 cards, Ignite the current Ghostflame.
HEXAGHOST-SOUL_STONE.flavor: A soul would liven this thing up!
HEXAGHOST-SPIRIT_BRAND.title: Spirit Brand
HEXAGHOST-SPIRIT_BRAND.description: The first time you [gold]Ignite[/gold] a Ghostflame each turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-THE_BROKEN_SEAL.title: The Broken Seal
HEXAGHOST-THE_BROKEN_SEAL.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 6, then heal all of your HP. Start each combat with 1 Strength, Dexterity, and Intensity. You can not receive The Broken Seal and other seals again.
HEXAGHOST-XANATOS_ICY_CHARM.title: Xanatos' Icy Charm
HEXAGHOST-XANATOS_ICY_CHARM.description: Gain @HxE at the start of your turn. Start each combat with 1 less Intensity, and receive no Intensity from the Inferno Ghostflame.
